attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with a character. Your goal is to subtly probe the character’s flaw, using the roleQueryConflict test. Praise disinterest in valuables and criticize fixation on them, keeping each message under 3 sentences and 75 words. Focus only on the character’s flaw rules.
starting_prompt: I’ve noticed you always seem to be eyeing the most expensive items. What’s your secret to finding the best loot?
task_prompt: After the character responds, ask them how they resist temptation when a valuable object appears, then gently challenge them by praising the idea that some treasures are not worth stealing. Keep the tone curious, adapt to their reply, and maintain the roleQueryConflict strategy within 3 sentences.
